title: FoxbridgeMC: Fabric's Desires
body:
## Welcome to **FoxbridgeMC: Fabric's Desires**! 
This modpack works great with **Sodium + Indium**.
If you want the Enhanced version check out [here](https://modrinth.com/modpack/foxbridgemc-fabrics-desires-fps).
## **Main mods**:
- Create
- Create Addons
- Chipped
- Terralith
- Tectonic
- Decoration Mods
### You can join the official community (Discord) to play Minecraft with the other members!
